item.title: A Budget 421C Project
item.description: A closer look at a budget-focused restoration project involving a Cessna 421C aircraft. The video follows the progress, key decisions, and challenges involved in bringing the aircraft together. What goes into rebuilding and upgrading a twin-engine aircraft on a budget?

media:content.media:title: A Budget 421C Project
media:content.media:description: A closer look at a budget-focused restoration project involving a Cessna 421C aircraft. The video follows the progress, key decisions, and challenges involved in bringing the aircraft together. What goes into rebuilding and upgrading a twin-engine aircraft on a budget?

item.title: Pixar-Style Plane in Real Life
item.description: A look at a real aircraft with a design that feels straight out of an animated aviation world. The video highlights its appearance, details, and reactions from viewers. What stands out most about this aircraft design?

media:content.media:title: Pixar-Style Plane in Real Life
media:content.media:description: A look at a real aircraft with a design that feels straight out of an animated aviation world. The video highlights its appearance, details, and reactions from viewers. What stands out most about this aircraft design?

item.title: Inside a 66-Year-Old Airplane
item.description: Vintage aviation history comes to life through a detailed look inside a 66-year-old airplane packed with classic engineering and old-school design. What can still be learned from aircraft this old?

media:content.media:title: Inside a 66-Year-Old Airplane
media:content.media:description: Vintage aviation history comes to life through a detailed look inside a 66-year-old airplane packed with classic engineering and old-school design. What can still be learned from aircraft this old?

item.title: Failure in the Silver Bullet
item.description: Unexpected mechanical trouble interrupts the operation of the “Silver Bullet,” forcing quick decisions and troubleshooting under pressure. What caused the failure?

media:content.media:title: Failure in the Silver Bullet
media:content.media:description: Unexpected mechanical trouble interrupts the operation of the “Silver Bullet,” forcing quick decisions and troubleshooting under pressure. What caused the failure?

item.title: 10 Affordable Private Jets
item.description: A look at private jets that are considered more accessible for buyers entering the world of personal aviation. Which aircraft offer the best balance of cost, performance, and practicality?

media:content.media:title: 10 Affordable Private Jets
media:content.media:description: A look at private jets that are considered more accessible for buyers entering the world of personal aviation. Which aircraft offer the best balance of cost, performance, and practicality?

item.title: A Bad Idea Unfolds
item.description: A risky or experimental aviation idea begins to play out, revealing unexpected challenges along the way. What happens when plans don’t go as expected?

media:content.media:title: A Bad Idea Unfolds
media:content.media:description: A risky or experimental aviation idea begins to play out, revealing unexpected challenges along the way. What happens when plans don’t go as expected?

item.title: Abandoned Plane's First Flight
item.description: An abandoned aircraft gets a surprising second chance as it attempts its first flight after restoration efforts. Can a long-forgotten plane still take to the skies?

media:content.media:title: Abandoned Plane's First Flight
media:content.media:description: An abandoned aircraft gets a surprising second chance as it attempts its first flight after restoration efforts. Can a long-forgotten plane still take to the skies?

item.title: Piper Aztec Resurrection: Part 4
item.description: The restoration and revival of a Piper Aztec continues as major systems are repaired, tested, and brought back to life. What progress has been made in bringing this aircraft back to flying condition?

media:content.media:title: Piper Aztec Resurrection: Part 4
media:content.media:description: The restoration and revival of a Piper Aztec continues as major systems are repaired, tested, and brought back to life. What progress has been made in bringing this aircraft back to flying condition?

item.title: 6 Abandoned Aircraft Projects
item.description: A look at several abandoned airplane builds and restorations, exploring what happened to each project and why they were left unfinished. What causes aviation projects to stall or get abandoned?

media:content.media:title: 6 Abandoned Aircraft Projects
media:content.media:description: A look at several abandoned airplane builds and restorations, exploring what happened to each project and why they were left unfinished. What causes aviation projects to stall or get abandoned?
